# Extração: 05-10X Podcast - Appearance Checklist

- **Fonte:** 05-10X Podcast - Appearance Checklist.pdf
- **Tipo:** PDF
- **Páginas:** 0
- **Tamanho:** 2.55 MB

---

Listen to episodes and read reviews
Do research on the host and company
Learn consistent segments or questions
Understand audience and their goals
Send your headshot and personal bio
DO YOUR RESEARCH
Plan a hook and outcome for listener
Think of a few quotable one-liners
Have a few relevant stories in mind
Ideas for takeaways (3 tips, 5 steps, etc)
Know what you will promote if permitted
PREPARE YOUR THOUGHTS
Purchase a professional microphone
Test your audio and video (if needed)
Ensure you have no disruptions or noise
Set up background and lighting (video)
Grab glass of water and use the restroom
CONTROL YOUR ENVIRONMENT
Login early to ensure no tech issues
Hit your talking points, but stay flexible
Build credibility while remaining humble
Have fun and smile! (even if on audio)
Show support for the host and show
DELIVER THE PERFORMANCE
